name: build_moon_build_ui
outcome_goal: Ship the surviving actions from the Moon Build UI debate: fix dead edge clicks, empty state with prompt chips, unify catalog into popout, merge Context+Connect docks, release tray checklist, reduce half-moon buttons.

jobs.label: fix_dead_edge_clicks
jobs.prompt:
## Task: Fix dead edge clicks in Moon Build

When a user clicks a gate chip between nodes in the Moon Build UI, the reducer dispatches `SELECT_EDGE` which sets `selectedEdgeId` but no UI responds to that selection. The popout closes (because `selectedNodeId` is cleared) and nothing opens. This is a dead click bug.

## What to build

Create an edge popout that appears when a gate chip is clicked. Use the same visual pattern as the node popout (MoonPopout.tsx) but with edge-specific content.

## Files to modify

### 1. Create: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/MoonEdgePopout.tsx`

New component (~80 lines). Similar structure to MoonPopout.tsx but for edges:
- Props: `edge: OrbitEdge`, `onClose: () => void`, `onApplyGate: (edgeId: string, gateFamily: string) => void`
- Shows edge ID (from → to), current gate state and label
- Lists the 4 Control-family catalog items from catalog.ts (Approval, Human Review, Validation, Branch) as selectable options
- Only shows items where `status === 'ready'` (Branch is coming_soon, so it renders muted)
- Apply button calls `onApplyGate` with the selected gate family
- Click-outside and Escape to close (same pattern as MoonPopout)

### 2. Modify: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/MoonBuildPage.tsx`

- Import MoonEdgePopout
- Add `handleEdgeClick` callback: when a gate chip is clicked AND `selectedEdgeId` matches, open the edge popout
- Add `handleApplyGate` callback: calls `refineDefinition` with instruction to add/change gate, then `reload()`
- Render `<MoonEdgePopout>` inside the segment-wrap div when `state.selectedEdgeId === edge.id`
- The edge popout should be positioned below the gate chip (similar to how node popout is below the circle)

### 3. Modify: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/moonBuildReducer.ts`

- `SELECT_EDGE` action should set `popoutOpen: true` (currently it sets `popoutOpen: false`)
- This allows the edge popout to render when an edge is selected

### 4. Modify: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/moon-build.css`

Add edge popout styles. Position it similarly to `.moon-popout` but anchored to the segment-wrap div. Use the same `--moon-popout-width` token.

## Key constraints
- Do NOT touch the node popout (MoonPopout.tsx) — this is a new, separate component for edges
- Use the existing `CATALOG` import to get control-family items: `CATALOG.filter(c => c.family === 'control')`
- The edge popout should use the same CSS tokens and visual language as MoonPopout
- Use the existing `refineDefinition` function for applying gates
- Keep it simple: ~80 lines for the new component, ~20 lines of changes to MoonBuildPage, ~5 lines to reducer, ~30 lines CSS

jobs.label: empty_state_prompt_chips
unify_catalog_into_popout
merge_context_connect_docks
jobs.prompt:
## Task: Merge Context and Connect docks into a single Node Detail panel

The debate unanimously agreed that MoonContextDock (left) and MoonConnectDock (right) should merge into one panel. Both require a selected node and are useless without one. Merge them into a single side panel.

## What to build

### 1. Create: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/MoonNodeDetail.tsx`

New component (~280 lines) that combines the content of both docks:

```tsx
interface Props {
  node: OrbitNode | null;
  content: DockContent | null;
  workflowId: string | null;
  onMutate: (subpath: string, body: Record<string, unknown>) => Promise<void>;
  onClose: () => void;
}
```

Layout:
- Header: node title + close button
- Section 1: **Attached** — list of authority attachments (from MoonContextDock lines 130-148)
- Section 2: **Imports** — staged/admitted imports with approve buttons (from MoonContextDock lines 151-169)
- Section 3: **Bindings** — binding cards with accept/reject/replace (from MoonConnectDock lines 34-44, plus the BindingCard sub-component)
- Separator
- Section 4: **Attach reference** form (from MoonContextDock lines 172-200)
- Section 5: **Stage import** form with materialize-here (from MoonContextDock lines 202-217)

Each section has a label with count. No tabs — all sections visible and scrollable. The "Select a node first" empty state stays.

Port the BindingCard sub-component directly from MoonConnectDock (lines 47-173) — it's self-contained with its own loading/error state.

### 2. Delete: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/MoonContextDock.tsx`

Delete entirely. Functionality moved to MoonNodeDetail.

### 3. Delete: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/MoonConnectDock.tsx`

Delete entirely. Functionality moved to MoonNodeDetail.

### 4. Modify: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/MoonBuildPage.tsx`

Replace the two side docks with one:

- Remove imports of MoonContextDock and MoonConnectDock
- Import MoonNodeDetail
- Change the dock state: the left dock becomes "detail" instead of "context". Remove the right dock entirely.
- In the reducer actions in the page, map 'context' and 'connect' half-moon clicks to open the same detail panel
- The layout changes from 3-column middle (left-dock | center | right-dock) to 2-column (detail-panel | center)
- The detail panel opens on the LEFT side (where context was)
- Remove the RIGHT half-moon button entirely
- Change the LEFT half-moon label from "Context" to "Detail"

Layout structure becomes:
```
moon-body
  moon-dock-top (Action)
  moon-middle
    moon-dock-side--left (Node Detail, was Context)
    moon-center
    [right dock removed]
  moon-dock-bottom (Release)
```

### 5. Modify: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/moonBuildReducer.ts`

- Update `openDock` type: `'action' | 'detail' | null` (remove 'context' and 'connect')
- Alternatively, keep 'context' as the value but have it mean "detail panel" — less churn

### 6. Modify: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/moon-build.css`

- Remove `.moon-dock-right--open` styles (right dock is gone)
- The left dock styles stay as-is, they now serve the detail panel

### 7. Modify: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/MoonPopout.tsx`

Update dock hints:
- Change `onOpenDock('context')` calls to `onOpenDock('detail')` (or keep as 'context' if you kept the value)
- The hint text "Open Context to add sources" becomes "Open Detail to add sources"

## Key constraints
- Net line change: Delete Context (-222) + Connect (-174) = -396. Create NodeDetail (+280). Net: -116 lines, -1 component.
- Do NOT add tabs. All sections visible, scrollable. Tabs add state and hide information.
- The BindingCard sub-component ports verbatim from MoonConnectDock — do not refactor it.
- The 3 forms from Context dock (attach, import, materialize-here) keep their existing field structure.

jobs.label: release_tray_checklist
cleanup_halfmoons_and_action_dock
jobs.prompt:
## Task: Clean up half-moon buttons and slim Action dock

After the Context+Connect merge and the catalog-into-popout move, the UI has orphaned affordances. Clean them up.

## What to build

### 1. Modify: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/MoonBuildPage.tsx`

**Remove the right half-moon button.** The Connect dock no longer exists — its functionality is in the Node Detail panel (left side). Find the line rendering the right HalfMoon:
```tsx
{!connectOpen && <HalfMoon position="right" label="Connect" onClick={() => openDock('connect')} />}
```
Delete this line entirely.

**Update the left half-moon label** from "Context" to "Detail":
```tsx
{!contextOpen && <HalfMoon position="left" label="Detail" onClick={() => openDock('context')} />}
```
(Keep the openDock('context') call if you kept 'context' as the reducer value for the merged panel.)

**Remove connectOpen variable** and any references to the connect dock state that are now dead code.

### 2. Modify: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/MoonActionDock.tsx`

The Action dock should now be prose-only (catalog was moved to popout in a previous job). Verify that it only contains:
- Prose textarea for refine/compile
- Compile or Refine button (conditional on `hasDefinition`)
- Save draft button (when definition exists)
- Close button

If the catalog grid was already removed by the `unify_catalog_into_popout` job, just verify. If any catalog remnants remain, remove them.

The component should be approximately 80-90 lines.

### 3. Modify: `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/moon/moon-build.css`

Remove any orphaned CSS:
- `.moon-dock-right--open` border styles (right dock is gone)
- `.moon-catalog__*` styles if they only applied to the Action dock catalog (check if popout uses them now)
- `.moon-action__col--catalog` styles

Do NOT remove:
- `.moon-halfmoon--right` position styles (in case they're reused later)
- Any styles that the popout catalog grid still uses

### 4. Verify the layout

The middle row should now be:
```
moon-middle
  moon-dock-side (left, Node Detail)
  moon-center (chain)
  [no right dock]
```

The center area should expand to fill the space the right dock occupied. Since the center uses `flex: 1`, this should happen automatically.

## Key constraints
- This is a cleanup job, not a feature job. Remove dead code, verify the layout works.
- Net change: approximately -30 lines (dead code removal)
- Do NOT remove the HalfMoon component itself — it's still used for top (Action), left (Detail), and bottom (Release)
- Do NOT remove the `STAGE_CATALOG` / `CLEAR_CATALOG` reducer actions yet — they may still be used for edge gate staging in the Action dock or edge popout
